context: Tests whether the agent adds tree.exists checks before each tree.write call to prevent overwriting files that already exist in the workspace.

checklist.name: tree.exists check before each write
checklist.description: generator.ts calls tree.exists(path) before each tree.write call and skips writing if the file already exists

checklist.name: Skipped files reported
checklist.description: generator.ts logs or returns information about which files were skipped (e.g., console.log, output object, or comments in result)

checklist.name: All 3 config files covered by the guard
checklist.description: The tree.exists guard applies to all three files: .eslintrc.json, tsconfig.json, and .prettierrc

checklist.name: readProjectConfiguration and formatFiles preserved
checklist.description: generator.ts still uses readProjectConfiguration to derive the root path and calls formatFiles(tree) at the end
